policyItems: It is possible to cancel a reservation and receive a full refund, provided that the cancellation occurs at least 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience.
The Cars Transportation service is non-refundable if guests have already utilized it and the tour is canceled due to inclement weather conditions.
In order to receive a full refund, cancellation of a reservation must be made at least 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience.
If a cancellation occurs less than 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience, no refund or rescheduling will be granted.
Requests for changes to a reservation made less than 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience will not be accommodated.
Cut-off times are based on the experiences local time.
This experience is weather dependent and if it's canceled due to unfavorable conditions, alternative dates or a full refund will be provided.
For private tour bookings, if guests do not show up before 12:00, we reserve the right to cancel the trip.
The occurrence of this experience is contingent upon the approval of the Port Authority regarding the weather conditions.
Tours booked with DAY TRIP BALI PT may be subject to cancellation for various reasons, such as inclement weather, operational issues, or low enrollment.

cancellationCards.title: Cancel 24h+ before departure -> Full refund
cancellationCards.text: Cancel at least 24 hours before your scheduled start time and receive a full refund.

cancellationCards.title: Cancel within 24h -> No refund
cancellationCards.text: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before departure are non-refundable.

cancellationCards.title: Weather cancellation (by us) -> Full refund
cancellationCards.text: If we cancel due to unsafe sea conditions, you can reschedule or receive a full refund.

weatherGuarantee.title: Free reschedule
weatherGuarantee.text: Move your trip to the next available safe date with no additional fee.

weatherGuarantee.title: Full refund option
weatherGuarantee.text: Choose a full refund if you prefer not to reschedule.

weatherGuarantee.title: Fast notification
weatherGuarantee.text: We contact you quickly on WhatsApp when weather affects operations.

items.label: Private boat
items.helper: Your group only, no shared seats.

items.label: All entrance tickets
items.helper: No extra fees on the day.
